case_title: ALLSTATE NORTHBROOK INDEMNITY COMPANY VS. JOSHUA DE LEON HERNANDEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-30-2024 CONTINUED TO DEC-18-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
